prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
# The Shy Octopus

Deep beneath the swaying seaweed, where sunlight danced in ribbons through the water, lived Oliver the octopus. Oliver was the most brilliant shade of purple, with eight wonderfully wiggly arms that could touch his nose and his toes all at the same time! But despite his magnificent color and amazing stretchy arms, Oliver was terribly shy. Whenever fish swam by his cozy cave, he would turn the same color as the rocks and hide behind his tentacles. More than anything in the whole wide ocean, Oliver wished he could make friends, but the thought of introducing himself made his heart thump faster than a dolphin's tail.
